name: better-toolkits
description: Source-available Claude Code toolkits monorepo — pick the toolkits your startup needs. One marketplace, ten toolkits.

plugins.name: make-no-mistakes
plugins.description: The disciplined dev lifecycle — implement issues, review PRs, sync releases, test E2E, manage sessions, stash secrets, and enforce manifest-driven tool-call hooks. One plugin to make no mistakes.

plugins.name: atomic-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Atomic Design toolkit for Flutter and Vite — decompose features into atoms, molecules, organisms, templates, and pages. Audit mode scans components, Vite bundle health (10 signals: duplicates, hashless assets, mixed majors, dual lockfiles, and more), and atomic-design enforcement hooks (V7: 7 cure-presence checks for future-drift exposure) across 18+ design system lenses. Migrate mode consumes audit reports to drive phased remediation. v1.3 adds /wcag-audit (WCAG 2.2 AA conformance + design-quality anti-AI-slop, scored /20) and /tokens-consolidate (extract + reconcile divergent design tokens across repos into a shared tokens package) — both siblings of /audit feeding /migrate.

plugins.name: ux-research-toolkit
plugins.description: Guided UX research map creation — experience maps, customer journey maps, service blueprints, storyboards, and user story maps. Helps non-experts create professional UX artifacts through dialogue, JSON data, and interactive HTML visualization.

plugins.name: business-model-toolkit
plugins.description: Interactive business model brainstorming — guided dialogue covering the full startup lifecycle from problem validation through execution and investor pitch. Includes a dedicated brand-identity skill (Brand Steering Wheel + Limbic Map emotional positioning + tone of voice) and an OKR + KPI-reporting operational layer.

plugins.name: app-gtm-release
plugins.description: Multi-platform app go-to-market and release toolkit — ship Flutter, Kotlin Multiplatform, .NET MAUI, Swift, and PWAs to Google Play, App Store, Microsoft Store, Snap Store, Flathub, and alternative channels. Three-tier command architecture: ship-advisor (strategy), per-framework ship-X commands (execution), ship-everywhere (mass publish). v2.3 adds the gtm-fit skill — GTM strategy layer (SLIP framework, minimum viable segment, organic presence system) so shipped apps also sell.

plugins.name: aaarrr-flywheel-toolkit
plugins.description: Growth-engineering toolkit. Funnel + flywheel completo: pricing strategy → landing-page design → instrumentation (Pixel + GA4 + PostHog + UTM) → AAARRR ejecución sobre Meta Marketing API. Awareness/Acquisition/Activation/Revenue como funnel lineal; Retention/Referral cierran el loop como flywheel que retroalimenta Acquisition con LAL audiences y K-factor real. Unit-economics doctrine (CAC blended vs paid, gross-margin LTV, payback en meses, benchmarks por modelo) y NPS + feedback loop (promoters/passives/detractors) integrados en revenue y retain. Mantra: fail fast, fail often, fail cheap, fail forward.

plugins.name: fractional-cto-toolkit
plugins.description: Operational toolkit for freelance and fractional CTOs — contracts, project-takeover SOPs, and a process-engineering pipeline (standardize → automation-triage → SOP authoring with executable output) for client onboarding, technical audits, and vendor evaluation.

plugins.name: instructional-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Guided instructional design toolkit — design cmi5-compliant courses and 1-on-1 session plans using CONTEXT→CONCEPT→BUILD→SHIP→REFLECT formula, Builder's Bloom's progression, Ship-First Design, and Kirkpatrick L1-L4 evaluation. Produces JSON + Markdown + HTML visualization + Marp slide decks.

plugins.name: launchpad-toolkit
plugins.description: Methodology prototype laboratory for chimeranext Launchpad pillar — AI intake, cap table, co-founder matching, investor matching, demo day prep, stage tracker, a 5-year financial-model generator (Setup → Assumptions → Calculations → Statements → charts, with per-business-model sanity checks), plus a chimeranext-api-consumer agent that enriches skills with live chimeranext API data when endpoints are available and degrades gracefully when they are not. Dual-purpose: external CLI for founders without chimeranext + internal validation lab for productizing patterns into the chimeranext Launchpad product.

plugins.name: venture-studio-toolkit
plugins.description: Macro portfolio management for venture studios and serial founders — LATAM corporate structures (Cayman Sandwich, Delaware Tostada, Skip-CR), Services Hub pattern with MSA templates, accelerator matching, govclab frameworks (studio thesis, focus, secret sauce), and Three Horizons portfolio allocation. Spanish-first; bilingual output framework documented for v1.3+.
